chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 63 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For hearing of main case. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 901/2025 (Stay/App) -------------- 10.04.2025. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Applicant. -------------------- Learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that during pendency of this Reference Application, Rectification Application of the Applicant has been allowed; hence this Reference Application has become infructuous along with pending application(s). Ordered accordingly. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
